title: monactis holwayae
intro: Monactis holwayae, also known as Holway's dwarf sunflower or Mexican sunflower, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and aiding in the treatment of gastrointestinal issues. Herbal preparations of Monactis holwayae can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and it is often used in traditional medicine to support overall well-being.
